title: Funding Readiness Scorecard
description: A worksheet that helps organize business profile information before a business owner explores possible funding paths.
complianceNotes: This tool does not determine approval or qualification.
Options depend on business profile and provider criteria.
Approval, terms, amounts, and timing are not guaranteed.

title: Referral Partner Fit Checker
description: A worksheet for evaluating whether a referral source is a strong fit for Partner outreach.
complianceNotes: Use this tool to prioritize outreach only.
Do not imply referral activity guarantees applications, approvals, funding, revenue, income, or outcomes.

title: Business Funding Conversation Planner
description: A planner for preparing business owner discovery conversations and safe next-step framing.
complianceNotes: Use exploratory language.
Do not promise approval, rates, terms, amounts, timelines, qualification, or outcomes.

title: Partner Weekly Review Generator
description: A future tool that turns weekly activity notes into a structured Partner review summary.
complianceNotes: Summaries should describe activity and next steps only.
Do not imply guaranteed business, funding, approval, revenue, income, or outcomes.

title: Commission Estimator
description: A future planning calculator for estimating possible commission scenarios without income guarantees.
complianceNotes: This tool must not promise income, revenue, funding, approvals, or closed deals.
Use example scenario language only.
Actual outcomes are not guaranteed.

title: Capital Stack Planner
description: A planning worksheet for thinking through possible categories of business funding needs.
complianceNotes: This planner does not determine available options.
Provider criteria apply.
Approval, terms, amounts, and timing are not guaranteed.

title: Bank Manager Handout Generator
description: A future workflow for drafting bank manager referral handout copy from approved positioning.
complianceNotes: Generated handouts require review before use.
Do not use anti-bank language.
Do not imply approval is guaranteed after a bank decline.

title: Compliance Language Checker
description: A future checker for flagging unsafe funding claims in scripts, handouts, emails, and launch kits.
complianceNotes: This checker assists review but does not replace human judgment.
Unsafe claims should be removed or rewritten before publishing.

title: Partner Launch Kit Builder
description: A future workflow for generating Partner launch kit drafts from structured Partner profile inputs.
complianceNotes: Generated launch kits require compliance review.
Do not generate approval, revenue, funding, income, or outcome claims.

title: Resource Recommendation Assistant
description: A future assistant that recommends Partner resources based on audience, Partner type, use case, and workflow stage.
complianceNotes: Recommendations should guide resource selection only.
Do not imply that using a resource guarantees funding, approvals, revenue, income, or outcomes.
